config.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Reset screen to default state on startup			
	"""
	#self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId = 23
	#self.session.custom.CurrentLineId  = 37
	self.getChild("root").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").props.currentTabIndex = 4
	self.getChild("root").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTable").getChild("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex = 0
	workstation=self.getChild("root").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntStation").getChild("txtStation").props.text
	param={'Workstation':workstation}
	res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Quality/getarealine",param)
	self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId = res[0]['Areaid']
	self.session.custom.CurrentLineId = res[0]['Lineid']
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshorder")
	self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime = 0
	self.session.custom.IsTimeExceed = False
	self.session.custom.cycleTime = 0
	self.session.custom.exceedStartTime = 0
	self.session.custom.exceedTime = 0
	self.session.custom.processEndTime = 0
	self.session.custom.processStartTime = 0
	self.session.custom.processTime = 0
	self.getChild("root").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntProgress").getChild("Progress").props.bar.color = '#8AFF8A'
	self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Quality Management"
	if self.session.custom.showSingleView:
		system.perspective.alterDock('Nav', {'handle':'hide'})
		system.perspective.closeDock('Nav')

onChange.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Get all details and perform prechecks on serial number scan			
	"""
	try:
		#system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshorder")
		#self.refreshBinding()
		#self.view.getChild("root").refreshBinding("custom.Order_details")
#		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntDefect").getChild("btnDefect").props.enabled=False
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntInspection").getChild("btnInspection").props.enabled=True
		
		SerialNumber=self.props.text
		if SerialNumber=='':
			self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime=''
			self.session.custom.IsTimeExceed =False
			self.session.custom.cycleTime=0
			self.session.custom.exceedStartTime=''
			self.session.custom.exceedTime=0
			self.session.custom.processEndTime=''
			self.session.custom.processStartTime=''
			self.session.custom.processTime=0
			system.perspective.print(self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime)
		else:
			WorkStationID = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
			AreaID = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
			LineID = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		try:
			status = Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.getStationDetails(WorkStationID,SerialNumber,AreaID,LineID)
			self.view.getChild("root").custom.StationStatus = status
			system.perspective.print("status--> %s"%status)
		except:
			self.view.getChild("root").custom.StationStatus = 0
		
		param={'SerialNumber':SerialNumber}
		order=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/GetOrderDetailsForWorkStation',param)
		BOMId=-1
		#system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.Order_details.getRowCount())
		if order.getRowCount()>0:
			BOMId=order.getValueAt(0,'BOMId')
			self.session.custom.BOMId = BOMId
		WorkStationID=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		AreaID=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		LineID=self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		if order.getRowCount()>0:
			ModelId=order.getValueAt(0,'ModelId')
		else:
			ModelId=-1
		cycleparams={'LineID':LineID,'WorkstationID':WorkStationID,'ModelID':ModelId}
		cycletime=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/getCycleTime',cycleparams)
		cycletime=cycletime.getValueAt(0,0)
		self.view.custom.ModelID=-1
		#system.perspective.print(SerialNumber)
		#system.perspective.print(BOMId)
		#orderStatus = Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.getOrderStatus(SerialNumber, BOMId)
		#if orderStatus:
			#Prev_Station_Status = Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.checkDetailsForOPStart(SerialNumber, WorkStationID, AreaID, LineID)
		#else:
			#Prev_Station_Status = -1
		Prev_Station_Status = 1
		if Prev_Station_Status == 1:
			if cycletime>0 and BOMId>0:
				system.perspective.print("Line 47 in serialNumber change script")
				serial=self.props.text
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedProcess").props.params.SerialNumber=serial
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedTorque").props.params.SerialNumber=serial
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedPrevStation").props.params.SerialNumber=serial
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedTestbed").props.params.Serial=serial
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedStationWiseStatus").props.params.Serial=serial
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedScannedValues").props.params.SerialNumber=serial
#			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("embeddedProcessStatus").props.params.SerialNumber=serial
				self.view.custom.serialNumber=serial
				self.view.custom.ModelID=ModelId
				self.view.custom.station=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntStation").getChild("txtStation").props.text
				system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshQualityCheck",scope='page')
				system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshNC",scope='page')
#				self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntDefect").getChild("btnDefect").props.enabled=True
			#if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntStation").getChild("txtStation").props.text=='TAQG04' or self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("tblLogNC").props.data.getRowCount()==0:
				#self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntInspection").getChild("btnInspection").props.enabled=True
				if SerialNumber!='' and self.parent.parent.getChild("cntOrder").getChild("TextField").props.text!='':
					self.session.custom.cycleTime = cycletime
					self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntProgress").getChild("Progress").props.bar.color = '#8AFF8A'
			else:
				serial=self.props.text
				self.view.custom.serialNumber=serial
				self.view.custom.ModelID=ModelId
				self.view.custom.station=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntStation").getChild("txtStation").props.text
				system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshQualityCheck",scope='page')
				system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshNC",scope='page')
				self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime=''
				self.session.custom.IsTimeExceed =False
				self.session.custom.cycleTime=0
				self.session.custom.exceedStartTime=''
				self.session.custom.exceedTime=0
				self.session.custom.processEndTime=''
				self.session.custom.processStartTime=''
				self.session.custom.processTime=0
				#self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntDefect").getChild("btnDefect").props.enabled=False
				#system.perspective.print(self.session.custom.cycleTime)
		elif Prev_Station_Status == 2:
			state = 'Warning'
			message = "Current Station Completed with Serial Number %s"%(SerialNumber)
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		elif Prev_Station_Status == -1:
			state = 'Warning'
			message = "Order status is not in Started State."
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		else:
			state = 'Warning'
			message = "Prev Station InCompleted with Serial Number %s"%(SerialNumber)
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
#	self.session.custom.cycleTime =  Project_VECV.NamedQuery.OperatorDashboard.CycleTime.getCycleTime(LineID, WorkStationID, ModelId)
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality')
		errorFunction = str('Event:changed Serial')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Reset serialnumber value			
	"""
	self.getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text=''
	self.view.custom.serialNumber=''
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntInspection").getChild("btnInspection").props.enabled=True
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntDefect").getChild("btnDefect").props.enabled=False

config.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			commit cell value in table data			
	"""
	valueToSet = event.value
	self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
	currentData=self.props.data

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Alter status value on row selection	
	"""
	try:
		checkdata=self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Status']
		system.perspective.print(self.props.selection.selectedColumn)
		system.perspective.print("checkdata %s"%checkdata)
		if checkdata==0 and str(self.props.selection.selectedColumn)=="Status":
			self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Status']=1
		if checkdata==1 and str(self.props.selection.selectedColumn)=="Status":
			self.props.data[self.props.selection.selectedRow]['Status']=0
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality/table_CheckList')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick - CheckList')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024

config.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Commit cell value into table data & check for error proofing operation.			
	"""
	selecteddata=self.props.selection.data

	operationType=str(selecteddata[0]['OPDefinition']).strip()
	
	system.perspective.print("selecteddata "+str(operationType))
	
	valueToSet = event.value
	if operationType.lower()==str('Error Proofing').lower():
		PartNumber = str(selecteddata[0]['PartNumber']).strip()
		system.perspective.print("selectedPartNumber "+str(PartNumber))
		system.perspective.print("Value:%s"%event.value)
		if str(PartNumber).upper() in str(event.value).upper():
			self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
			currentData=self.props.data
		else:
			selecteddata[0]['ConsumedPartNumber']=''
			state = 'Warning'
			message = "Incorrect Part Scan. Please scan or enter correct part."
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
	else:
		self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
		currentData=self.props.data

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Enable field values for edit based on OP definition			
	"""
	try:
		selecteddata=self.props.selection.data
		operationType=str(selecteddata[0]['OPDefinition']).strip()
		system.perspective.print("selecteddata "+str(operationType))
		
		if operationType.lower()==str('Error Proofing').lower():
			self.props.columns[8].editable=True
		#system.perspective.print("IF CONDITION")
		else:
			self.props.columns[8].editable=False
		#system.perspective.print("Else CONDITION")
		
		if operationType.lower()==str('Torque').lower() or operationType.lower()==str('Double Torque').lower():
			self.props.columns[2].editable=True
			self.props.columns[3].editable=True
			self.props.columns[4].editable=True
			self.props.columns[5].editable=True
		else:
			self.props.columns[2].editable=False
			self.props.columns[3].editable=False
			self.props.columns[4].editable=False
			self.props.columns[5].editable=False

		if operationType.lower()==str('Pressing Operation').lower():
			self.props.columns[6].editable=True
			self.props.columns[7].editable=True
		else:
			self.props.columns[6].editable=False
			self.props.columns[7].editable=False
			
		if operationType.lower()==str('Operator Scan').lower():
			self.props.columns[9].editable=True
		else:
			self.props.columns[9].editable=False
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality/table_LogNC')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick - logNC')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

selecteddata=self.props.selection.data
	operationType=str(selecteddata[0]['OPDefinition']).strip()
	system.perspective.print("selecteddata "+str(operationType))
	if operationType.lower()==str('Error Proofing').lower():

messageHandlers.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Refresh LogNC table			
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		#system.perspective.print(len(self.props.data))
		if len(self.props.data)==0:
			#system.perspective.print("enable inspection 1")
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFooter").getChild("cntInspection").getChild("btnInspection").props.enabled=True
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality')
		errorFunction = str('Event:RefreshNC')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Query to save exceed time		
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	# implement your handler here
	params = {
	'AreaId' : self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId, 
	'LineId' : self.session.custom.CurrentLineId,
	'WorkStationId' : self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId ,
	'SerialNumber' : self.view.custom.serialNumber ,
	'ProcessStartTime' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.processStartTime,
	'ProcessEndTime' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.exceedStartTime,
	'ExceedStartTime' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.exceedStartTime ,
	'ExceedEndTime' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.ExceedEndTime ,
	'OperatorId' : self.session.custom.loggedInUserId ,
	'Reason' : payload['Id'] ,
	'CreatedBy' : self.session.custom.loggedInUserId 
	}
	queryPath = 'Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/InsertIntoExceedTime'
	system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,params)
	self.session.custom.cycleTime = 0
	self.session.custom.exceedStartTime = ''
	self.session.custom.exceedTime = 0
	self.session.custom.processEndTime = ''
	self.session.custom.processStartTime = '' 
	self.session.custom.processTime = 0
	self.session.custom.IsTimeExceed = False

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Open exceed time popup			
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	if self.custom.exceedTime > self.custom.cusionTime:
		self.session.custom.processTime = 0
		self.session.custom.cycleTime = 0
		self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime = system.date.now()
		exceedTime = self.custom.exceedTime
		message = "Process Time exceeded by %s sec"%exceedTime
		system.perspective.openPopup(id='#exceed', view='Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/ExceedPopUp',params={'warningMessage':message},showCloseIcon = False)
		self.session.custom.exceedTime = 0

# implement your handler here
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/05/2024
			Purpose: Save Defect in Table.
		"""
		system.perspective.print(self.view.custom.bom)
		system.perspective.print(self.session.custom.BOMId)
		
		system.perspective.print(self.view.custom.ModelID)
		system.perspective.print(self.view.custom.model)
				
		params = {
		'AreaId' :  self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId,
		'LineId' : self.session.custom.CurrentLineId,
		'WorkStationId' : self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,
		'SerialNumber' : self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text,
		'OrderNumber' : self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntOrder").getChild("TextField").props.text,
		'BOMId' : self.session.custom.BOMId,
		
		'DefectId' : payload['Id'],
		'OperatorID' : self.session.custom.loggedInUserId, 
		'Comments' : payload['comments'],
		'CreatedBy' : self.session.custom.loggedInUserId,
		'DefectName' : payload['defectName']}
		dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/InsertQGDefect',params)
		state = 'success'
		message = 'Data Saved Successfully'
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	

		system.util.getLogger("Take Out Message handler script").info("script called")
		WorkInstructionId = ''
		OPCodeId = ''
		OPDefinitionId = ''
		WITypeId = ''
		seqNo = 0
		
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		OPType=''
		system.perspective.print("Take Out Message Handler Script--OPType:%s"%OPType)
		payload = {}
		

		SerialNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text
		WorkStationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		BOMId = self.session.custom.BOMId
		ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		#### ADD Takeout event in StationEvent table
		payload = {'EventID':Project_VECV.config.getTakeOutID() , 'OPCodeId':OPCodeId, 'OPDefinitionId':OPDefinitionId,
		'MST_Status_Id':3, 'OrderNumber':self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntOrder").getChild("TextField").props.text}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType='InsertIntoStationEvents', payload=payload, scope='page')
		
		#### Add Takeout event in Takein_TakeOut table
		params={'areaid':self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId,'Lineid':self.session.custom.CurrentLineId,'serial':SerialNumber,
		'ordernum':self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntOrder").getChild("TextField").props.text,
		'bomid':BOMId,'station':WorkStationId,'operator':ModifiedBy}
		system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/InsertTakeOutData",params)		
		
		### Update Release Production Order table with Takeout event
		ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		OrderNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntOrder").getChild("TextField").props.text
		Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.UpdateOrderStatus(ModifiedBy, SerialNumber, BOMId, OrderNumber)
		
		SerialNumber = SerialNumber
		stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		state='Info'
		userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
		ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation				

		data="Take Out for Serial Number %s"%(SerialNumber)
		Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
		## Flush all data and send takeout bit to PLC
		system.perspective.sendMessage('flash', scope='page')
	except:
		screenName ='Rework-Quality'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality Management/WorkStation')  
		errorFunction = str('Message handler : saveDefect -> cntColumn/cntAction/cntQuality')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

viewParams.message: Do you want to complete the Inspection ?

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 27/06/2024
		Purpose: Call Confirmation popup after prechecks completion. 
	"""
	try:
		serialNum = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text
		if serialNum != "":
			AreaID=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
			LineID=self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
			WorkStationID=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
			SerialNumber = self.view.custom.serialNumber
			if str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation).upper() in ['LAQG04','LAQG05']:
				system.perspective.print('in if ------->')
				Prev_Station_Status = Project_VECV.Quality.checkPrevStation.checkDetailsForOPStart(SerialNumber, WorkStationID, AreaID, LineID)
			else:
				dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/parallelPrevCheck/parallelPrevCheck',{'MST_line_Id':LineID})
				getparallelStation = ''
				for data in dataset:
				    if str(data['ParallelStation']) == str(WorkStationID):
				        getparallelStation = str(data['MST_WorkStation_Id'])
				        break
				
				if getparallelStation == '':
				    #get Prev station status for current Station
				    Prev_Station_Status = Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.checkDetailsForOPStart(SerialNumber, WorkStationID, AreaID, LineID)
				else:
				    #check it Station Station is Already OK or NOT
				    Prev_Station_Status = Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.getStationDetails(WorkStationID,SerialNumber,AreaID,LineID)
				    #0 --> NOK & 1=--> OK
				    if Prev_Station_Status == 0:
				        Prev_Station_Status = Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.checkDetailsForOPStart(SerialNumber, getparallelStation, AreaID, LineID)
				        if Prev_Station_Status == 1 or Prev_Station_Status == 2:
				            Prev_Station_Status = 1
				        else:
				            Prev_Station_Status = 0
				    else:
				        Prev_Station_Status = 2
			        
			if Prev_Station_Status == 1:
				NCdata=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("tblLogNC").props.data
				system.perspective.print("len of nc %s"%len(NCdata))
				if(len(NCdata) > 0):
					ncState='Not Ok'
				else:
					ncState='Ok'
				system.perspective.print("ncState %s"%ncState)
				if ncState=='Ok':
					inspectionListTable = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("tblCheckPoints").props.data
					system.perspective.print("Lenght:%s"%str(len(inspectionListTable)))
					if(len(inspectionListTable) > 0):
						for row in range(len(inspectionListTable)):
		#					system.perspective.print("Inside Loop:%s"%str(row))
							status = inspectionListTable[row]['Status']
							if(str(status) == 'False' or str(status) == '0'):
								status= 'Not Ok'
								break
							else:
								status= 'Ok'
					else:
						status= 'Ok'
					if status != "Not Ok":	
						message = 'Do you want to complete the Inspection?'
						params = {'bom':self.view.custom.bom,'checkListData':self.view.custom.checklistTable,'message':message,
						'modelNumber':self.view.custom.ModelID,'orderNumber':self.view.custom.order,'serialNumber':self.view.custom.serialNumber,
						'workStationName':self.view.custom.station}
						system.perspective.openPopup("Inspection", "Project_VECV/PopUp/Quality/InspectionConfirmationPopup", params, showCloseIcon=False)
						try:
							stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
							state='Info'
							userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
							ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
							data='Inspection clicked for SerialNumber %s'%SerialNumber
							Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
						except:
							pass
					else:
						state = 'Warning'
						message = 'Please complete all checkpoints before inspection.'
						try:
							stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
							state='Info'
							userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
							ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
							data='Please complete all checkpoints before inspection for SerialNumber %s'%SerialNumber
							Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
						except:
							pass
						Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
				else:
					state = 'Warning'
					message = 'Please clear all LogNCs before inspection.'
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
					try:
						stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
						state='Info'
						userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
						ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
						data='Please clear all LogNCs before inspection for SerialNumber %s'%SerialNumber
						Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
					except:
						pass
			elif Prev_Station_Status == 2:
			    state = 'Warning'
			    message = "Current Station Completed with Serial Number %s"%(SerialNumber)
			    Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			    try:
				    stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
				    state='Info'
				    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
				    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
				    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
			    except:
					pass
			elif Prev_Station_Status == -1:
			    state = 'Warning'
			    message = "Order status is not in Started State."
			    Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			    try:
				    stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
				    state='Info'
				    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
				    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
				    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
			    except:
					pass
			else:
			    state = 'Warning'
			    message = "Prev Station InCompleted with Serial Number %s"%(SerialNumber)
			    Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			    try:
				    stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
				    state='Info'
				    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
				    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
				    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
			    except:
					pass
		else:
		    state = 'Warning'
		    message = "SerialNumber is Empty. Please Scan serialnumber."
		    Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		    try:
			    stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
			    state='Info'
			    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
			    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
			    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
		    except:
				pass
	except:
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality')
		errorFunction = str('Event:btnInspection--onClick')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 05/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Update log NC data			
	"""
	try:
		NCdata=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("tblLogNC").props.data
		order=self.view.getChild("root").custom.Order_details
		system.perspective.print("LOOP1")
		if(len(NCdata) > 0):
			for row in range(len(NCdata)):
				eventid=NCdata[row]['MST_Event_Id']
				torqueval=NCdata[row]['PLCTorqueValue']
				torquecount=NCdata[row]['PLCTorqueCount']
				torqueangle=NCdata[row]['Torque_Angle']
				torqueresult=NCdata[row]['PLCTorqueResult']
				pressingval=NCdata[row]['PressingValue']
				pressingdep=NCdata[row]['PressingDepth']
				operatorid=NCdata[row]['OperatorID']
				stationeventid=NCdata[row]['TRN_Station_Events_Id']
				opdef=NCdata[row]['OPDefinition']
				ConsumedPart=NCdata[row]['ConsumedPartNumber']
				partnum=NCdata[row]['PartNumber']
				createdby=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
				serialnumber=self.view.custom.serialNumber
#				WITypeID=NCdata[row]['MST_WIType_Id']
				WITypeID=''
				OPDefID=NCdata[row]['MST_OPDefinition_Id']
				OPDef=NCdata[row]['OPDefinition']
				BOMID=order.getValueAt(0,'BOMId')
				OPCodeID=NCdata[row]['MST_OPCode_Id']
				lineid=self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
				areaid=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
				workstationid=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
				trnstid=NCdata[row]['TRN_Station_Events_Id']
				system.perspective.print("trnstid %s"%trnstid)
				eventid=0
				if opdef=='Operator Scan' and operatorid!='' and operatorid!=0 :
					eventid=5
				if opdef=='Torque' and float(torqueval)>0 and int(torqueangle)>0 and int(torqueresult)>0:
					eventid=5
				if opdef=='Double Torque' and float(torqueval)>0 and int(torqueangle)>0 and int(torqueresult)>0:
					eventid=5
				if opdef=='Pressing Operation' and float(pressingval)>0 and float(pressingdep)>0 :
					#system.perspective.print(pressingval)
					eventid=5
				if opdef=='Error Proofing' and partnum!='' and partnum!=0:
					eventid=5
				if opdef=='Process Status' or opdef=='Visual WI' or opdef=='Process Data':
					eventid=5
				if eventid==5:
					params= {'stationeventid':stationeventid,'torqueval':torqueval, 'torquecount': torquecount,'torqueangle':torqueangle,'torqueresult':torqueresult, 'pressingval':pressingval, 'pressingdep':pressingdep, 'operatorid':operatorid,'partnum':partnum,'createdby':createdby,'serialnumber':serialnumber,'WIID':'','WITypeID':WITypeID,'OPDefID':OPDefID,'WorkstationID':workstationid,'areaID':areaid,'lineID':lineid,'BOMID':BOMID,'OPCodeID':OPCodeID,'trnstid':trnstid,'ConsumedPart':ConsumedPart}
				#params= {'stationeventid':stationeventid,'eventid':eventid ,'torqueval':torqueval, 'torquecount': torquecount,'torqueangle':torqueangle,'torqueresult':torqueresult, 'pressingval':pressingval, 'pressingdep':pressingdep, 'operatorid':operatorid}
				#system.perspective.print(params)
					insertDetails = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/AddUpdateQGNC',params)
					try:
						stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
						state='Info'
						userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
						ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
						data="Log NC Cleared for Serial Number %s "%serialnumber
						Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
					except:
						pass
			system.perspective.sendMessage('RefreshNC',scope='page')
			
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Screen' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/Quality')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick - updateNC')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

	"""
